description: Example batch demonstrating the config schema: two topics researched via Path B (four OpenRouter substrates fan out, then a Claude synthesis cross-checks them). Copy this file, edit the topics, and run `mantis run openrouter config/<your>.json` then `synthesis`, or use `mantis research "<question>"` for a one-shot run. See prompts/playbooks/ for prompt-authoring guidance.

topics.title: Columnar vs row-oriented storage engines
topics.research_prompt: Research the trade-offs between columnar and row-oriented storage engines for analytical vs transactional workloads. Cover compression, vectorized execution, and when hybrid (HTAP) designs win. Cite primary sources (papers, engine docs).

topics.title: Approximate nearest-neighbour index trade-offs (HNSW vs IVF-PQ)
topics.research_prompt: Compare HNSW and IVF-PQ approximate nearest-neighbour indexes for vector search: recall/latency/memory trade-offs, build cost, and when each is the right default. Cite benchmarks and the original papers.
